title: Main Navigation
description: KWV header nav resting state: uppercase top-level links, font-size 300, medium weight, centred. Scoped (child combinator at the container level) to the nav's own top-level row so it never bleeds into a nested mega-menu nav. !important is required because WordPress wraps a block style's css in :root :where() (zero specificity), which would otherwise tie with core/Ollie. The brand-300 sliding underline (::after + :hover) lives in assets/styles/core-navigation.css — the css field mangles content:"", strips :hover, and drops all-but-one of a comma-separated selector list.
